title: rnaseq-nf pipeline parameters
description: Proof of concept of a RNA-seq pipeline implemented with Nextflow

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

input.description: Path to the samplesheet CSV containing sample identifiers and paired FASTQ files.
input.help_text: Provide a CSV file with the columns `sample`, `fastq_1`, and `fastq_2`. Relative FASTQ paths are resolved from the samplesheet location.
input.errorMessage: The input must be a valid CSV file path with no spaces, ending in '.csv', and must exist.
